---
title: "Lieut. Frederick Duke Yonge R.N."
---

## Lieut. Frederick Duke Yonge R.N.

**Dates:** (24 March 1816-1889)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Son of the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Antony, he was dismissed in disgrace for going AWOL 1855, emigrated to New Zealand, married (1859)  Charlotte Andrews (d. 1922), and has living descendants.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 12th [?1873]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
